name: Matrix keypad
description: The `matrix_keypad` component allows you to integrate pads which have the keys connected at the intersection points of the rows and columns of a matrix.

config_entries.label: Columns
config_entries.description: A list of [pins](https://esphome.io/guides/configuration-types#pin-schema) where the vertical matrix lines are connected, in order from left to right. These pins need to be input capable with pullups enabled. If there is no internal pullup, then an external one is required.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: Rows
config_entries.description: A list of [pins](https://esphome.io/guides/configuration-types#pin-schema) where the horrizontal matrix lines are connected, in order from top to bottom. These pins need to be output capable.

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Input
config_entries.description: Set the input mode flag.

config_entries.label: Output
config_entries.description: Set the output mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pullup
config_entries.description: Set the pullup mode flag.

config_entries.label: Pulldown
config_entries.description: Set the pulldown mode flag.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Set the ID of this device for use in lambdas.

config_entries.label: Has Diodes
config_entries.description: For pads where row pins are outputs, and the keys are connected with diodes. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Has Pulldowns
config_entries.description: For pads where the column lines have external pulldowns. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Keys
config_entries.description: The keys present on the matrix, from top left to bottom right, row by row. Required for `key_collector` and `binary_sensor` (if using key selection).
